content_body:
Call (706) 432-2140 to apply your discount!

Plan your cabin trip to Georgia and apply these special deals and discounts to your stay in one of our Blue Ridge luxury cabin rentals. Blue Ridge, GA is just 90 minutes north of Atlanta and getting away to the mountains is easy and affordable with Cabin Rentals of Georgia.

Stay 2 Nights, Get the 3rd Free!

Enjoy a visit in January or February and enjoy the 3rd night free! Use code WINTER243 when booking online or over the phone. 

*Applies to 3-night bookings in the winter season, does not apply to holidays*

Sign up for 10% Off!

Use the form in the bottom right corner of our website, sign up for a 10% off special!

Stay 6 Nights, Get the 7th Free!

Stay 6 nights, get the 7th free with code STAY647! 

Guest Loyalty Points

The most meaningful compliment we receive is our returning Guests. To show how much we appreciate you, every reservation that you make with us generates Loyalty Reward Points which translates points into dollars. Call our office to redeem.

  • These points are not redeemable online, so be sure to call our office when making your return reservation and we can apply your significant discount to your stay 
  • Up to $250 earned points/dollars can be used per reservation only 
  • Can be used any time of year
  • Cannot be used in combination with any other Special Offer

Hillsdale College Friends & Family Discount

The CROG family has proudly supported Hillsdale College for many years, and because we love this bastion of freedom and learning, we would like to offer a special discount to those affiliated with Hillsdale College. If you have a direct relation to this esteemed institution (alum, parent, faculty, etc.), please call us to receive a special promotion!

Call (706) 432-2140 to make the reservation and mention one of these coupon codes specifically!

SPECIAL TERMS:

  • Specials do not apply to last-minute dates that are already discounted
  • Specials and promotions are not offered over holidays or peak time periods unless noted
  • Specials cannot be combined or included with any other promotions or discounts
  • Guest must call to redeem this offer with Cabin Rentals of Georgia and it must be applied at the time of booking, otherwise void 
  • Specials can only be applied to reservations where the stay meets the minimum night requirements 
  • Specials for mid-week stays (Sunday - Thursday) must be redeemed with one of our reservationists over the phone
title: Specials & Discounts
